description: Lonecat AIO Z-Image ver17 — T2I Turbo core (EmptyLatent, denoise=1.0, Qwen off, SaveImage only). Built from graphToPrompt export + proven T2I wire-ups.
notes: Bypass in UI when re-exporting: Qwen Prompt, Load Image/I2I, ControlNet optional off
Latent = EmptyLatentImage; denoise fixed 1.0 for pure T2I
VAE ae.safetensors wired to VAEDecode (UE bake)
Do not use convert_ui_to_api on full AIO — use this .api.json via workflow_api_runner
